potion of healing.name: potion of healing
potion of healing.effect: Restores HP. Blessed: full heal. Cursed: reduces max HP.
potion of healing.notes: Use when HP < 60%. Do NOT use if cursed. Drink with 'drink' action.

potion of extra healing.name: potion of extra healing
potion of extra healing.effect: Restores more HP than potion of healing. Also cures blindness.
potion of extra healing.notes: Save for emergencies (HP < 40%). Higher priority than regular healing.

potion of full healing.name: potion of full healing
potion of full healing.effect: Fully restores HP and increases max HP.
potion of full healing.notes: Most valuable healing item. Only use when near death.

scroll of identify.name: scroll of identify
scroll of identify.effect: Identifies one or more items in inventory.
scroll of identify.notes: Use to identify unknown potions/scrolls/rings before using them.

scroll of teleportation.name: scroll of teleportation
scroll of teleportation.effect: Teleports you to a random location on the current level.
scroll of teleportation.notes: Useful escape tool when surrounded. Cursed version confuses you instead.

food ration.name: food ration
food ration.effect: Fills nutrition. Most filling food item.
food ration.notes: Eat when Hungry or Weak. Do not wait until Fainting.

quarterstaff.name: quarterstaff
quarterstaff.effect: Wizard starting weapon. Two-handed, decent early damage.
quarterstaff.notes: Keep equipped as wizard. Do not swap unless you find something clearly better.
